allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --quiet pydantic tenacity pytest)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --quiet pandas pyarrow datasets typer rich tqdm)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); k = os.environ.get\('GROQ_API_KEY', ''\); print\('GROQ_API_KEY set:', bool\(k\), '| starts with gsk_:', k.startswith\('gsk_'\), '| length:', len\(k\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); k = os.environ.get\('GROQ_API_KEY', ''\); print\('GROQ_API_KEY loaded from .env:', bool\(k\), '| length:', len\(k\)\)")
